creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #14)
> (In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #13)
> 
> Can't _LATE_CONFIGURE_ARGS be used for ports like openjdk8?

Mmm, _LATE_CONFIGURE_ARGS could be the place where --disable-silent-rules is set, depending on the result on shell test, yes.

What is the reason openjdk8 can't use it ? Is it really using a GNU configure script ?
